name: TikTok Ads
title: The Complete TikTok Ads Setup Guide
subtitle: Step-by-Step Training to Launch Profitable TikTok Ads
description: Learn how to properly set up TikTok ads from scratch and launch campaigns that can generate leads, sales, and business growth. This course breaks down the ad setup process in a simple and practical way, so users can confidently create and run high-performing campaigns.

name: Meta Ads
title: The Complete Meta Ads Setup Guide
subtitle: Step-by-Step Training to Launch Profitable Meta Ads
description: Master the complete setup process for Facebook and Instagram ads. Learn how to structure campaigns properly, avoid costly mistakes, and launch ads that drive leads, conversions, and business growth.

name: Google Ads
title: The Complete Google Ads Setup Guide
subtitle: Step-by-Step Training to Launch Profitable Google Ads
description: Learn how to set up Google Ads campaigns correctly to reach the right audience, drive quality traffic, and generate profitable results. Covers campaign structure, targeting, and launch strategy.
